title: New Song Spotlight
description: This week’s spotlight is Harry Styles’ "Watermelon Sugar" — a bright, sun-soaked pop song with an easy groove, playful energy, and a chorus made for a happy crowd. Released during the Fine Line era, it became Styles’ first No. 1 single in the United States and later earned him his first Grammy, winning Best Pop Solo Performance. For a Djembe show, it brings a warm summer pulse, a little flirtation, and the kind of instantly recognizable hook that can lift the whole room.
